query:
SELECT 'students' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT 'instruments', COUNT(*) FROM instruments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lessons (total)', COUNT(*) FROM lessons
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lessons (agendada)', COUNT(*) FROM lessons WHERE status = 'agendada'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lessons (realizada)', COUNT(*) FROM lessons WHERE status = 'realizada'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lessons (falta/cancelada)', COUNT(*) FROM lessons WHERE status IN ('falta','cancelada')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_dues (total)', COUNT(*) FROM payment_dues
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_dues (pendente)', COUNT(*) FROM payment_dues WHERE status = 'pendente'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_dues (vencidas)', COUNT(*) FROM payment_dues WHERE status = 'pendente' AND dueDate < CURDATE()
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_dues (vencem em 3 dias)', COUNT(*) FROM payment_dues WHERE status = 'pendente' AND dueDate BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY);
